flags.message: Forward-mode cell provisioned on an already-decided event: the provisioned baseline snapshot (2026-07-13) itself records the disposition — May 11, 2026 entries 'Judgment VACATED and case REMANDED for further consideration in light of Louisiana v. Callais' and 'Judgment Issued' — yet event.yaml still shows resolved: false. Likely cause: the deterministic disposition patterns in src/fedcourtsai/pipeline/cert_signals.py require grant/deny/dismiss language and do not match an appeal-posture vacate-and-remand order that contains no 'grant' word, so the outcome never latched and the case kept being provisioned as pending. Consider adding a vacate-and-remand ('in light of') pattern and/or having forward provisioning skip cells whose latest snapshot already carries a terminal disposition entry.

Outcome known to predictor: the disposition (and the dissent lineup) was visible in the guaranteed-common snapshot input, not retrieved. reasoning.md reasons from the pre-decision record only and predicts no per-justice votes, but this cell cannot be scored as a genuine forward prediction — recommend discounting it in evaluation.
